name: Enchanted Forest Reference Biome Kit
sourceStyle: Original supplied side-scrolling forest reference image

atlases.usage: Path, dirt, moss, grass, bank, and ground-transition tiles for the walkable band.
Raised mossy platforms, cliff faces, ledge caps, bridge pieces, logs, steps, and water-bank ledges.
Streams, water edges, puddles, cascades, ripples, lily pads, submerged stones, and water/path transitions.
Tree trunks, canopy pieces, shrubs, vines, ferns, root clusters, logs, mushrooms, and foreground foliage strips.
Ruin stones, standing stones, wooden stakes, gates, banners, torches, crates, shrine fragments, and markers.

atlases.alpha: use additive or screen blend; dark preview background may need shader/mask treatment
atlases.usage: Blue mist strips, glow overlays, torch glows, water sparkles, fireflies, leaf scatter, moss, pebble, mud, root, wet shine, and shadow decals.

composerRules: Build the map from reusable assets instead of a single baked 8000px background.
Keep the playable lane visually readable around Y 420-560.
Use terrain tiles for the main path and water tiles for channels.
Place large trees and blue fog behind the path for depth.
Place foreground foliage at high depth so the hero can pass behind some leaves without obscuring gameplay.
Use torches and banner gate pieces only near the right-side exit area.
Use the FX atlas with additive/screen blending for blue mist, torch glow, fireflies, and water sparkle.
